title: micropyrum tenellum subsp. patens
intro: Micropyrum tenellum subsp. patens is a rare plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Herbal preparations of Micropyrum tenellum subsp. patens include teas and infusions, as well as dried extracts that can be used in traditional medicine.
